ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player (in meters) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player (in kilograms) */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League that the team plays in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the team is based */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the match */,
  "weather" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the formation was used */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that used the formation */,
  "formation_shape" TEXT /* Shape of the formation (e.g., 4-4-2, 4-3-3) */,
  "formation_width" REAL /* Width of the formation (in meters) */,
  "formation_depth" REAL /* Depth of the formation (in meters) */,
  "formation_type" TEXT /* Type of formation (e.g., defensive, attacking) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formations_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who made the movement */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the movement occurred */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation used during the movement */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the movement */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the movement */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered during the movement (in meters) */,
  "speed" REAL /* Speed of the movement (in km/h) */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Acceleration during the movement (in m/s^2) */,
  "deceleration" REAL /* Deceleration during the movement (in m/s^2) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_movements_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_movements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_movements_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who occupied the position */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the position occurred */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation used during the position */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-coordinate of the position (in meters) */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the position (in meters) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the position was recorded */,
  "orientation" REAL /* Orientation of the player (in degrees) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_positions_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the statistic occurred */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation used during the statistic */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target made by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the player */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team that achieved the statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the statistic occurred */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation used during the statistic */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target made by the team */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed by the team */,
  "tackles_won" INTEGER /* Number of tackles won by the team */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_stats_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the event occurred */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation used during the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, shot, pass) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who triggered the event */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-coordinate of the event */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who achieved the statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the statistic occurred */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation used during the statistic */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the player during the match */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the player during the match */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Average acceleration of the player during the match */,
  "deceleration" REAL /* Average deceleration of the player during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_stats_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formation_match_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation that achieved the statistic */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the statistic occurred */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the formation */,
  "distance_covered" REAL /* Distance covered by the formation during the match */,
  "speed" REAL /* Average speed of the formation during the match */,
  "acceleration" REAL /* Average acceleration of the formation during the match */,
  "deceleration" REAL /* Average deceleration of the formation during the match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_match_stats_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_match_stats_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who triggered the event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the event occurred */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation used during the event */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, shot, pass) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-coordinate of the event */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_events_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_events_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formation_match_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation that triggered the event */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., goal, shot, pass) */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time when the event occurred */,
  "x_position" REAL /* X-coordinate of the event */,
  "y_position" REAL /* Y-coordinate of the event */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the event (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_match_events_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_match_events_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jersey_numbers" (
  "jersey_number_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jersey number */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who wears the jersey number */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number worn by the player */,
  "season" INTEGER /* Season when the jersey number was worn */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jersey_number_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_jersey_numbers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formation_slots" (
  "formation_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation slot */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation that the slot belongs to */,
  "slot_number" INTEGER /* Number of the slot (e.g., 1, 2, 3, etc.) */,
  "slot_type" TEXT /* Type of slot (e.g., defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formation_slots_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_formation_slots" (
  "player_formation_slot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player formation slot */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who occupies the slot */,
  "formation_slot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the formation slot */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match where the player occupied the slot */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes played by the player in the slot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_formation_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_formation_slots_formation_slot_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_slot_id") REFERENCES formation_slots ("formation_slot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_formation_slots_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_formation_slots_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who suffered the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury (e.g., muscle strain, ligament sprain) */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the player recovered from the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_suspensions" (
  "suspension_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each suspension */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who is suspended */,
  "suspension_type" TEXT /* Type of suspension (e.g., red card, yellow card accumulation) */,
  "suspension_date" TEXT /* Date when the suspension was issued */,
  "lift_date" TEXT /* Date when the suspension is lifted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("suspension_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_suspensions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
